
### exercise: control hazard timing+forwarding? 

<!-- \lstset{
    language=myasm,
    morekeywords={mrmovq,irmovq,rmmovq,rrmovq,addq},
    moredelim=**[is][\btHL<2|handout:0>]{~2~}{~end~},
    moredelim=**[is][\btHL<4|handout:0>]{~3~}{~end~},
} -->
 

* with F/D/E/M/W: what is fetched when? what is forwarded?

![](/pipeline/texfig/sameHazEx1.figure.svg){width=950px}


### [solution]: control hazard timing+forwarding? 

<!-- \lstset{
    language=myasm,
    morekeywords={mrmovq,irmovq,rmmovq,rrmovq,addq},
    moredelim=**[is][\btHL<2|handout:0>]{~2~}{~end~},
    moredelim=**[is][\btHL<4|handout:0>]{~3~}{~end~},
} -->
 

* with F/D/E/M/W: what is fetched when? what is forwarded?
 

::: {.r-stack}
![](/pipeline/texfig/sameHazEx1Soln.figure-1.svg){.fragment .fade-in-then-out fragment-index=1 width=950px}

![](/pipeline/texfig/sameHazEx1Soln.figure-2.svg){.fragment .fade-in-then-out fragment-index=2 width=950px}

![](/pipeline/texfig/sameHazEx1Soln.figure-3.svg){.fragment .fade-in-then-out fragment-index=3 width=950px}

![](/pipeline/texfig/sameHazEx1Soln.figure-4.svg){.fragment .fade-in-then-out fragment-index=4 width=950px}

![](/pipeline/texfig/sameHazEx1Soln.figure-5.svg){.fragment .fade-in-then-out fragment-index=5 width=950px}

![](/pipeline/texfig/sameHazEx1Soln.figure-6.svg){.fragment .fade-in-then-out fragment-index=6 width=950px}


:::


### exercise: with different pipeline 

<!-- \lstset{
    language=myasm,
    morekeywords={mrmovq,irmovq,rmmovq,rrmovq,addq},
    moredelim=**[is][\btHL<2|handout:0>]{~2~}{~end~},
    moredelim=**[is][\btHL<4|handout:0>]{~3~}{~end~},
} -->
 

* with F/D/E1/E2/M/W

![](/pipeline/texfig/diffHazEx2.figure.svg){width=950px}


### [solution]: with different pipeline 

<!-- \lstset{
    language=myasm,
    morekeywords={mrmovq,irmovq,rmmovq,rrmovq,addq},
    moredelim=**[is][\btHL<2|handout:0>]{~2~}{~end~},
    moredelim=**[is][\btHL<4|handout:0>]{~3~}{~end~},
} -->
 

* with F/D/E1/E2/M/W

![](/pipeline/texfig/diffHazEx2Soln.figure.svg){width=950px}
